comments: Approved. The contract scope is properly bounded to documentation-only work: it explicitly limits execution to scanning documentation/EN and documentation/ZH for placeholder content, rewriting those documentation files with concrete technical/operational content, embedding schema references, adding YAML workflow examples, and documenting CLI/Git collaboration commands. The out_of_scope clause correctly forbids modifications to src/ or bin/ logic, forbids active workflow/dispatch.json state semantic changes outside this patch progression, and disallows runtime execution code changes. Allowed files are restricted to documentation/EN/**, documentation/ZH/**, and task artifacts under tasks/v0.8-docs-archon-upgrade/**, which is consistent with the requested documentation amendment boundary. Required outputs are documentation files plus task result artifacts, and no contract language expands scope beyond documentation replacement and supporting review artifacts.
